title: Beyond the Blocks
description: Vanilla+ modpack that features distant horizon and optimizations for Minecraft. Better than real lifeX)
body:
Beyond the Blocks - turn your Minecraft into a dream. This Datapack complements Vanilla Minecraft without changing its essence. The main mods of this modpack are Distant Horizons, Tectonic, Iris. Also in the modpack there is a full optimization of Minecraft, including Sodium.

You can find the version of Bliss Shaders, which supports Distant Horizons on author's Github page: https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader
